CANONICAL ARCHITECTURE (MANDATORY)
- TypeScript end-to-end
- Monorepo (Nx or Turborepo)
- Backend: NestJS
- Web: Next.js
- Mobile: React Native (Expo)
- Offline-first:
  - SQLite local DB
  - Outbox pattern

  - Idempotency keys

WEB UI

UI THEME + COMMON CSS (MANDATORY REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATION)
- The web app must include a baseline “SaaS theme” consistent with shadcn/ui patterns.

	EXTERNAL DATA SERVICES (SCALING-READY)

SECURITY & OBSERVABILITY
- OIDC (Keycloak recommended)
- RBAC + tenancy scoping
- Rate limiting
- Append-only audit logs
- OpenTelemetry metrics/logs/traces scaffolding

POS MODE (ONLY IF inputs.yml -> app_type = POS)

  "textEditContent": "import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';\nimport { SwaggerModule, DocumentBuilder } from '@nestjs/swagger';\nimport { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { AppModule } from './app/app.module';\nimport { ConfigService } from './app/config/config.service';\nimport { Logger } from 'winston';\n\nasync function bootstrap() {\n  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule);\n  const configService = app.get(ConfigService);\n  const logger = app.get&lt;Logger&gt;('winston');\n\n  // Enable CORS for all origins in development, specific origins in production\n  app.enableCors({\n    origin: configService.get('CORS_ORIGINS')?.split(',') || true,\n    credentials: true,\n  });\n\n  // Global validation pipe\n  app.useGlobalPipes(\n    new ValidationPipe({\n      transform: true,\n      whitelist: true,\n      forbidNonWhitelisted: true,\n    }),\n  );\n\n  // API prefix\n  app.setGlobalPrefix('api/v1');\n\n  // Swagger documentation\n  if (configService.get('NODE_ENV') !== 'production') {\n    const config = new DocumentBuilder()\n      .setTitle('Nucleus Business Suite API')\n      .setDescription('Full-featured business management suite API')\n      .setVersion('1.0')\n      .addBearerAuth()\n      .addTag('auth', 'Authentication endpoints')\n      .addTag('users', 'User management')\n      .addTag('inventory', 'Inventory management')\n      .addTag('proposals', 'Proposal/Quotation management')\n      .addTag('invoices', 'Invoice management')\n      .addTag('expenses', 'Expense tracking')\n      .addTag('hr', 'Human Resources')\n      .addTag('pos', 'Point of Sale')\n      .addTag('projects', 'Project management')\n      .addTag('tasks', 'Task management')\n      .addTag('crm', 'Customer relationship management')\n      .addTag('sync', 'Offline synchronization')\n      .addTag('realtime', 'Real-time features')\n      .build();\n    const document = SwaggerModule.createDocument(app, config);\n    SwaggerModule.setup('api/docs', app, document);\n  }\n\n  const port = configService.get('PORT') || 3001;\n  await app.listen(port);\n\n  logger.info(&#96;🚀 Nucleus Business Suite API running on: http://localhost:${port}/api/v1&#96;);\n  if (configService.get('NODE_ENV') !== 'production') {\n    logger.info(&#96;📚 API Documentation: http://localhost:${port}/api/docs&#96;);\n  }\n}\n\nbootstrap();",

}

AuthModule } from './auth/auth.module';\nimport { UsersModule } from './users/users.module';\nimport { InventoryModule } from './inventory/inventory.module';\nimport { ProposalsModule } from './proposals/proposals.module';\nimport { InvoicesModule } from './invoices/invoices.module';\nimport { ExpensesModule } from './expenses/expenses.module';\nimport { HrModule } from './hr/hr.module';\nimport { PosModule } from './pos/pos.module';\nimport { ProjectsModule } from './projects/projects.module';\nimport { TasksModule } from './tasks/tasks.module';\nimport { CrmModule } from './crm/crm.module';\nimport { SyncModule } from './sync/sync.module';\nimport { RealtimeModule } from './realtime/realtime.module';\nimport { AuditModule } from './audit/audit.module';\nimport { ThrottlerModule } from '@nestjs/throttler';\nimport { ScheduleModule } from '@nestjs/schedule';\nimport { WinstonModule } from 'nest-winston';\nimport * as winston from 'winston';\n\n@Module({\n  imports: [\n    // Core configuration\n    ConfigModule,\n    \n    // Database connection\n    DatabaseModule,\n    \n    // Logging\n    WinstonModule.forRoot({\n      transports: [\n        new winston.transports.Console({\n          format: winston.format.combine(\n            winston.format.timestamp(),\n            winston.format.colorize(),\n            winston.format.simple(),\n          ),\n        }),\n        new winston.transports.File({\n          filename: 'logs/error.log',\n          level: 'error',\n          format: winston.format.combine(\n            winston.format.timestamp(),\n            winston.format.json(),\n          ),\n        }),\n        new winston.transports.File({\n          filename: 'logs/combined.log',\n          format: winston.format.combine(\n            winston.format.timestamp(),\n            winston.format.json(),\n          ),\n        }),\n      ],\n    }),\n    \n    // Rate limiting\n    ThrottlerModule.forRoot([{\n      ttl: 60000,\n      limit: 100,\n    }]),\n    \n    // Scheduled tasks\n    ScheduleModule.forRoot(),\n    \n    // Business modules\n    AuthModule,\n    UsersModule,\n    InventoryModule,\n    ProposalsModule,\n    InvoicesModule,\n    ExpensesModule,\n    HrModule,\n    PosModule,\n    ProjectsModule,\n    TasksModule,\n    CrmModule,\n    \n    // Technical modules\n    SyncModule,\n    RealtimeModule,\n    AuditModule,\n  ],\n})\nexport class AppModule {}",

}

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/app/config/config.service.ts)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/app/config/config.service.ts)",

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as yaml from 'js-yaml';\nimport * as path from 'path';\n\ninterface InputsConfig {\n  inputs: {\n    app_type: 'GENERIC' | 'POS';\n    project: {\n      name: string;\n      purpose: string;\n      features: string[];\n    };\n    domains: {\n      root_domain: string;\n      staging_subdomain: string;\n      production_subdomain: string;\n      api_prefix: string;\n      realtime_prefix: string;\n    };\n    derived_urls: {\n      development: {\n        web: string;\n        api: string;\n        realtime: string;\n      };\n      staging: {\n        web: string;\n        api: string;\n        realtime: string;\n      };\n      production: {\n        web: string;\n        api: string;\n        realtime: string;\n      };\n    };\n    constraints: {\n      data_services: {\n        mode: 'local' | 'external';\n        external?: {\n          postgres?: {\n            host: string;\n            port: number;\n            database: string;\n            ssl_mode: string;\n          };\n          redis?: {\n            host: string;\n            port: number;\n            tls: boolean;\n          };\n          object_storage?: {\n            provider: 's3' | 'r2' | 'gcs' | 'minio';\n            endpoint: string;\n            bucket: string;\n            region: string;\n          };\n        };\n      };\n      tenancy: 'single' | 'multi';\n      data_sensitivity: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';\n      realtime: 'none' | 'notifications' | 'live' | 'chat' | 'all';\n      offline: 'none' | 'read-only' | 'offline-writes';\n      deployment: 'compose' | 'compose+swarm' | 'k8s-later';\n    };\n  };\n}\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class ConfigService {\n  private readonly inputs: InputsConfig;\n  private readonly envConfig: { [key: string]: string };\n\n  constructor() {\n    // Load inputs.yml from project root\n    const inputsPath = path.join(process.cwd(), '../../inputs.yml');\n    if (fs.existsSync(inputsPath)) {\n      const inputsFile = fs.readFileSync(inputsPath, 'utf8');\n      this.inputs = yaml.load(inputsFile) as InputsConfig;\n    } else {\n      throw new Error('inputs.yml not found in project root');\n    }\n\n    // Load environment variables\n    this.envConfig = process.env;\n  }\n\n  get(key: string): string | undefined {\n    return this.envConfig[key];\n  }\n\n  getInputs(): InputsConfig {\n    return this.inputs;\n  }\n\n  getEnvironment(): 'development' | 'staging' | 'production' {\n    return (this.get('NODE_ENV') as 'development' | 'staging' | 'production') || 'development';\n  }\n\n  getUrls() {\n    const env = this.getEnvironment();\n    return this.inputs.inputs.derived_urls[env];\n  }\n\n  getDatabaseUrl(): string {\n    const env = this.getEnvironment();\n    \n    if (this.inputs.inputs.constraints.data_services.mode === 'external') {\n      const external = this.inputs.inputs.constraints.data_services.external;\n      if (external?.postgres) {\n        const { host, port, database, ssl_mode } = external.postgres;\n        const username = this.get('DB_USERNAME') || 'postgres';\n        const password = this.get('DB_PASSWORD') || '';\n        return &#96;postgresql://${username}:${password}@${host}:${port}/${database}?sslmode=${ssl_mode}&#96;;\n      }\n    }\n    \n    // Local mode - use Docker Compose service names\n    const username = this.get('DB_USERNAME') || 'postgres';\n    const password = this.get('DB_PASSWORD') || 'postgres';\n    const host = env === 'development' ? 'localhost' : 'postgres';\n    const port = this.get('DB_PORT') || '5432';\n    const database = this.get('DB_NAME') || 'nucleus_business_suite';\n    \n    return &#96;postgresql://${username}:${password}@${host}:${port}/${database}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  getRedisUrl(): string {\n    const env = this.getEnvironment();\n    \n    if (this.inputs.inputs.constraints.data_services.mode === 'external') {\n      const external = this.inputs.inputs.constraints.data_services.external;\n      if (external?.redis) {\n        const { host, port, tls } = external.redis;\n        const password = this.get('REDIS_PASSWORD') || '';\n        const protocol = tls ? 'rediss' : 'redis';\n        return &#96;${protocol}://:${password}@${host}:${port}&#96;;\n      }\n    }\n    \n    // Local mode\n    const password = this.get('REDIS_PASSWORD') || '';\n    const host = env === 'development' ? 'localhost' : 'redis';\n    const port = this.get('REDIS_PORT') || '6379';\n    const auth = password ? &#96;:${password}@&#96; : '';\n    \n    return &#96;redis://${auth}${host}:${port}&#96;;\n  }\n\n  getJwtSecret(): string {\n    return this.get('JWT_SECRET') || 'development-secret-change-in-production';\n  }\n\n  getJwtExpiresIn(): string {\n    return this.get('JWT_EXPIRES_IN') || '1d';\n  }\n\n  isPosMode(): boolean {\n    return this.inputs.inputs.app_type === 'POS';\n  }\n\n  isOfflineEnabled(): boolean {\n    return this.inputs.inputs.constraints.offline !== 'none';\n  }\n\n  isRealtimeEnabled(): boolean {\n    return this.inputs.inputs.constraints.realtime !== 'none';\n  }\n}",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma)",

  "textEditContent": "// This is your Prisma schema file,\n// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// CORE SYSTEM MODELS\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel User {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  email     String   @unique\n  username  String?  @unique\n  firstName String?\n  lastName  String?\n  password  String\n  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  roles         UserRole[]\n  sessions      UserSession[]\n  auditLogs     AuditLog[]\n  assignedTasks Task[]          @relation(\"TaskAssignee\")\n  createdTasks  Task[]          @relation(\"TaskCreator\")\n  projects      ProjectMember[]\n  \n  // POS Relations (only relevant in POS mode)\n  posOrders     PosOrder[]\n  posShifts     PosShift[]\n\n  @@map(\"users\")\n}\n\nmodel Role {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String   @unique\n  description String?\n  permissions String[] // Array of permission strings\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  users UserRole[]\n\n  @@map(\"roles\")\n}\n\nmodel UserRole {\n  id     String @id @default(cuid())\n  userId String\n  roleId String\n\n  // Relations\n  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  role Role @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([userId, roleId])\n  @@map(\"user_roles\")\n}\n\nmodel UserSession {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  userId    String\n  token     String   @unique\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"user_sessions\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// AUDIT &amp; SYNC MODELS\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel AuditLog {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  userId      String?\n  action      String    // CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, etc.\n  entityType  String    // User, Product, Order, etc.\n  entityId    String\n  oldValues   Json?     // Previous state\n  newValues   Json?     // New state\n  metadata    Json?     // Additional context\n  timestamp   DateTime  @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  user User? @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"audit_logs\")\n}\n\nmodel OutboxEvent {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  eventType   String    // sync.user.created, sync.order.updated, etc.\n  entityType  String\n  entityId    String\n  payload     Json\n  processed   Boolean   @default(false)\n  processedAt DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  retryCount  Int       @default(0)\n  maxRetries  Int       @default(3)\n\n  @@map(\"outbox_events\")\n}\n\nmodel SyncCursor {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  entityType String  @unique // users, products, orders, etc.\n  lastSync  DateTime @default(now())\n  cursor    String?  // Last processed cursor/timestamp\n\n  @@map(\"sync_cursors\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// INVENTORY MANAGEMENT\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Category {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  description String?\n  parentId    String?\n  isActive    Boolean   @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  parent   Category?  @relation(\"CategoryHierarchy\", fields: [parentId], references: [id])\n  children Category[] @relation(\"CategoryHierarchy\")\n  products Product[]\n\n  @@map(\"categories\")\n}\n\nmodel Product {\n  id          String  @id @default(cuid())\n  sku         String  @unique\n  name        String\n  description String?\n  categoryId  String?\n  \n  // Pricing\n  basePrice   Decimal @default(0)\n  cost        Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Physical properties\n  weight      Decimal?\n  dimensions  Json?    // {length, width, height, unit}\n  \n  // Inventory\n  stockQuantity      Int     @default(0)\n  lowStockThreshold  Int     @default(10)\n  isTrackStock      Boolean @default(true)\n  \n  // Status\n  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  category     Category?           @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])\n  variants     ProductVariant[]\n  inventory    InventoryMovement[]\n  proposalItems ProposalItem[]\n  invoiceItems InvoiceItem[]\n  posOrderItems PosOrderItem[]\n\n  @@map(\"products\")\n}\n\nmodel ProductVariant {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  name      String\n  sku       String  @unique\n  price     Decimal\n  cost      Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Variant-specific attributes\n  attributes Json?   // {color: \"red\", size: \"L\"}\n  \n  // Inventory\n  stockQuantity Int     @default(0)\n  isActive      Boolean @default(true)\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  product       Product             @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  inventory     InventoryMovement[]\n  proposalItems ProposalItem[]\n  invoiceItems  InvoiceItem[]\n  posOrderItems PosOrderItem[]\n\n  @@map(\"product_variants\")\n}\n\nmodel InventoryMovement {\n  id            String    @id @default(cuid())\n  productId     String?\n  variantId     String?\n  movementType  String    // IN, OUT, ADJUSTMENT, TRANSFER\n  quantity      Int\n  unitCost      Decimal?\n  totalCost     Decimal?\n  reason        String?\n  referenceType String?   // ORDER, PURCHASE, ADJUSTMENT\n  referenceId   String?\n  timestamp     DateTime  @default(now())\n  createdBy     String?\n\n  // Relations\n  product Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"inventory_movements\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// PROPOSALS &amp; INVOICING\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Customer {\n  id      String @id @default(cuid())\n  name    String\n  email   String?\n  phone   String?\n  address Json?   // Structured address\n  \n  // Business info\n  companyName String?\n  taxId       String?\n  \n  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  proposals Proposal[]\n  invoices  Invoice[]\n  posOrders PosOrder[]\n\n  @@map(\"customers\")\n}\n\nmodel Proposal {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  number      String   @unique // Auto-generated proposal number\n  customerId  String\n  title       String\n  description String?\n  \n  // Pricing &amp; markup\n  subtotal       Decimal @default(0)\n  taxAmount      Decimal @default(0)\n  totalAmount    Decimal @default(0)\n  markupColumns  Json?   // Array of markup percentages for 5 columns\n  \n  // Status &amp; workflow\n  status         String  @default(\"DRAFT\") // DRAFT, SENT, APPROVED, REJECTED, EXPIRED\n  version        Int     @default(1)\n  parentId       String? // For versioning\n  \n  // Dates\n  issueDate      DateTime @default(now())\n  validUntil     DateTime?\n  approvedAt     DateTime?\n  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  customer     Customer       @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  parent       Proposal?      @relation(\"ProposalVersions\", fields: [parentId], references: [id])\n  versions     Proposal[]     @relation(\"ProposalVersions\")\n  items        ProposalItem[]\n  invoices     Invoice[]      // Converted invoices\n  approvals    ProposalApproval[]\n\n  @@map(\"proposals\")\n}\n\nmodel ProposalItem {\n  id         String  @id @default(cuid())\n  proposalId String\n  productId  String?\n  variantId  String?\n  \n  // Custom item (for non-product items)\n  customName        String?\n  customDescription String?\n  \n  // Pricing with markup columns\n  quantity          Decimal\n  unitPrice         Decimal\n  markupPrices      Json?   // Array of 5 prices with different markup rates\n  selectedColumn    Int     @default(1) // Which markup column was selected (1-5)\n  lineTotal         Decimal\n  \n  // Order\n  sortOrder Int @default(0)\n\n  // Relations\n  proposal Proposal        @relation(fields: [proposalId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product  Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant  ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"proposal_items\")\n}\n\nmodel ProposalApproval {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  proposalId String\n  approverEmail String\n  status     String   @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED\n  comments   String?\n  approvedAt DateTime?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  proposal Proposal @relation(fields: [proposalId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"proposal_approvals\")\n}\n\nmodel Invoice {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  number     String   @unique\n  customerId String\n  proposalId String?  // If converted from proposal\n  \n  // Amounts\n  subtotal    Decimal @default(0)\n  taxAmount   Decimal @default(0)\n  totalAmount Decimal @default(0)\n  paidAmount  Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Status\n  status     String   @default(\"DRAFT\") // DRAFT, SENT, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED\n  \n  // Dates\n  issueDate  DateTime @default(now())\n  dueDate    DateTime?\n  paidDate   DateTime?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  customer Customer      @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  proposal Proposal?     @relation(fields: [proposalId], references: [id])\n  items    InvoiceItem[]\n  payments Payment[]\n\n  @@map(\"invoices\")\n}\n\nmodel InvoiceItem {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  invoiceId String\n  productId String?\n  variantId String?\n  \n  // Custom item\n  customName        String?\n  customDescription String?\n  \n  // Pricing\n  quantity  Decimal\n  unitPrice Decimal\n  lineTotal Decimal\n  \n  // Order\n  sortOrder Int @default(0)\n\n  // Relations\n  invoice Invoice         @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"invoice_items\")\n}\n\nmodel Payment {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  invoiceId   String\n  amount      Decimal\n  method      String   // CASH, CARD, BANK_TRANSFER, etc.\n  reference   String?  // Transaction reference\n  notes       String?\n  paidAt      DateTime @default(now())\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  invoice Invoice @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"payments\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// EXPENSE TRACKING\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel ExpenseCategory {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String    @unique\n  description String?\n  isActive    Boolean   @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  expenses Expense[]\n\n  @@map(\"expense_categories\")\n}\n\nmodel Expense {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  categoryId  String\n  projectId   String?  // Link to project if project-related\n  \n  // Details\n  description String\n  amount      Decimal\n  currency    String   @default(\"USD\")\n  \n  // Metadata\n  vendor      String?\n  receiptUrl  String?\n  notes       String?\n  \n  // Dates\n  expenseDate DateTime\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  category ExpenseCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])\n  project  Project?        @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"expenses\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// HUMAN RESOURCES\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Employee {\n  id           String    @id @default(cuid())\n  employeeId   String    @unique\n  userId       String?   @unique // Link to User if they have system access\n  \n  // Personal info\n  firstName    String\n  lastName     String\n  email        String?\n  phone        String?\n  address      Json?\n  \n  // Employment\n  position     String\n  department   String?\n  hireDate     DateTime\n  salary       Decimal?\n  hourlyRate   Decimal?\n  \n  // Status\n  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)\n  terminationDate DateTime?\n  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  attendance   Attendance[]\n  payroll      PayrollRecord[]\n  timeEntries  TimeEntry[]\n\n  @@map(\"employees\")\n}\n\nmodel Attendance {\n  id         String    @id @default(cuid())\n  employeeId String\n  date       DateTime  @db.Date\n  clockIn    DateTime?\n  clockOut   DateTime?\n  breakStart DateTime?\n  breakEnd   DateTime?\n  totalHours Decimal?\n  notes      String?\n  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  employee Employee @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id])\n\n  @@unique([employeeId, date])\n  @@map(\"attendance\")\n}\n\nmodel TimeEntry {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  employeeId  String\n  projectId   String?  // Optional project association\n  taskId      String?  // Optional task association\n  \n  // Time tracking\n  startTime   DateTime\n  endTime     DateTime?\n  duration    Int?     // Duration in minutes\n  description String?\n  \n  // Billing\n  billable    Boolean  @default(false)\n  hourlyRate  Decimal?\n  amount      Decimal?\n  \n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  employee Employee @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id])\n  project  Project? @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  task     Task?    @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"time_entries\")\n}\n\nmodel PayrollRecord {\n  id            String   @id @default(cuid())\n  employeeId    String\n  payPeriodStart DateTime @db.Date\n  payPeriodEnd   DateTime @db.Date\n  \n  // Earnings\n  regularHours  Decimal  @default(0)\n  overtimeHours Decimal  @default(0)\n  regularPay    Decimal  @default(0)\n  overtimePay   Decimal  @default(0)\n  bonus         Decimal  @default(0)\n  grossPay      Decimal  @default(0)\n  \n  // Deductions\n  taxes         Decimal  @default(0)\n  insurance     Decimal  @default(0)\n  retirement    Decimal  @default(0)\n  otherDeductions Decimal @default(0)\n  totalDeductions Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Net pay\n  netPay        Decimal  @default(0)\n  \n  // Status\n  status        String   @default(\"DRAFT\") // DRAFT, APPROVED, PAID\n  paidDate      DateTime?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  employee Employee @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id])\n\n  @@unique([employeeId, payPeriodStart, payPeriodEnd])\n  @@map(\"payroll_records\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// PROJECT MANAGEMENT\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Project {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  description String?\n  status      String   @default(\"ACTIVE\") // ACTIVE, COMPLETED, ON_HOLD, CANCELLED\n  \n  // Dates\n  startDate   DateTime?\n  endDate     DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  \n  // Budget\n  budget      Decimal?\n  currency    String   @default(\"USD\")\n\n  // Relations\n  members     ProjectMember[]\n  tasks       Task[]\n  expenses    Expense[]\n  timeEntries TimeEntry[]\n\n  @@map(\"projects\")\n}\n\nmodel ProjectMember {\n  id        String @id @default(cuid())\n  projectId String\n  userId    String\n  role      String @default(\"MEMBER\") // OWNER, MANAGER, MEMBER\n\n  // Relations\n  project Project @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user    User    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([projectId, userId])\n  @@map(\"project_members\")\n}\n\nmodel Task {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  title       String\n  description String?\n  projectId   String?   // Optional - tasks can exist without projects\n  \n  // Assignment\n  assignedToId String?\n  createdById  String\n  \n  // Status &amp; Priority\n  status      String    @default(\"TODO\") // TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CANCELLED\n  priority    String    @default(\"MEDIUM\") // LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT\n  \n  // Dates\n  dueDate     DateTime?\n  completedAt DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  \n  // Recurrence (for recurring tasks)\n  isRecurring Boolean   @default(false)\n  recurrenceRule Json?  // Cron-like rule for recurrence\n  \n  // Tags and categorization\n  tags        String[]  // Array of tag strings\n  category    String?\n\n  // Relations\n  project     Project?    @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])\n  assignee    User?       @relation(\"TaskAssignee\", fields: [assignedToId], references: [id])\n  creator     User        @relation(\"TaskCreator\", fields: [createdById], references: [id])\n  comments    TaskComment[]\n  attachments TaskAttachment[]\n  timeEntries TimeEntry[]\n\n  @@map(\"tasks\")\n}\n\nmodel TaskComment {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  taskId    String\n  userId    String\n  content   String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  task Task @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"task_comments\")\n}\n\nmodel TaskAttachment {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  taskId    String\n  fileName  String\n  fileUrl   String\n  fileSize  Int?\n  mimeType  String?\n  uploadedAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  task Task @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"task_attachments\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// CUSTOMER SUPPORT\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel SupportTicket {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  ticketNumber String  @unique\n  customerId  String?\n  \n  // Content\n  subject     String\n  description String\n  priority    String   @default(\"MEDIUM\") // LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT\n  status      String   @default(\"OPEN\") // OPEN, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED, CLOSED\n  category    String?\n  \n  // Assignment\n  assignedToId String?\n  \n  // Dates\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  resolvedAt  DateTime?\n\n  // Relations\n  customer Customer? @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  responses TicketResponse[]\n\n  @@map(\"support_tickets\")\n}\n\nmodel TicketResponse {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  ticketId  String\n  userId    String?\n  content   String\n  isInternal Boolean @default(false) // Internal notes vs customer-visible responses\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  ticket SupportTicket @relation(fields: [ticketId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"ticket_responses\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// POINT OF SALE (POS) - Only relevant when app_type = POS\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel PosDevice {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  name       String\n  deviceId   String   @unique // Hardware identifier\n  location   String?\n  isActive   Boolean  @default(true)\n  lastSeen   DateTime?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  orders PosOrder[]\n  shifts PosShift[]\n\n  @@map(\"pos_devices\")\n}\n\nmodel PosShift {\n  id         String    @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId   String\n  userId     String\n  startTime  DateTime  @default(now())\n  endTime    DateTime?\n  \n  // Cash management\n  openingCash  Decimal @default(0)\n  closingCash  Decimal?\n  totalSales   Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Status\n  status     String   @default(\"OPEN\") // OPEN, CLOSED\n  notes      String?\n\n  // Relations\n  device PosDevice @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n  user   User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  orders PosOrder[]\n\n  @@map(\"pos_shifts\")\n}\n\nmodel PosOrder {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  orderNumber String  @unique\n  deviceId   String?\n  shiftId    String?\n  userId     String\n  customerId String?\n  \n  // Order details\n  subtotal   Decimal  @default(0)\n  taxAmount  Decimal  @default(0)\n  totalAmount Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Payment\n  paymentMethod String? // CASH, CARD, MIXED, etc.\n  paymentStatus String  @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, PAID, REFUNDED, PARTIAL_REFUND\n  \n  // Status\n  status     String   @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, REFUNDED\n  \n  // Timestamps\n  orderDate  DateTime @default(now())\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  device   PosDevice?     @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n  shift    PosShift?      @relation(fields: [shiftId], references: [id])\n  user     User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])\n  customer Customer?      @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])\n  items    PosOrderItem[]\n  payments PosPayment[]\n  refunds  PosRefund[]\n\n  @@map(\"pos_orders\")\n}\n\nmodel PosOrderItem {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  orderId   String\n  productId String?\n  variantId String?\n  \n  // Custom item\n  customName String?\n  \n  // Pricing\n  quantity  Decimal\n  unitPrice Decimal\n  lineTotal Decimal\n  \n  // Discounts\n  discountAmount Decimal @default(0)\n  discountType   String? // PERCENTAGE, FIXED\n  \n  // Order\n  sortOrder Int @default(0)\n\n  // Relations\n  order   PosOrder        @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"pos_order_items\")\n}\n\nmodel PosPayment {\n  id       String  @id @default(cuid())\n  orderId  String\n  amount   Decimal\n  method   String  // CASH, CARD, etc.\n  reference String? // Card transaction reference\n  paidAt   DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  order PosOrder @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"pos_payments\")\n}\n\nmodel PosRefund {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  orderId    String\n  amount     Decimal\n  reason     String?\n  method     String   // CASH, CARD, etc.\n  reference  String?\n  processedBy String?\n  refundedAt DateTime @default(now())\n\n  // Relations\n  order PosOrder @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"pos_refunds\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// SHIPPING &amp; DELIVERY\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Shipment {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  invoiceId  String?  // Optional link to invoice\n  orderId    String?  // Optional link to POS order\n  \n  // Shipping details\n  trackingNumber String?\n  carrier        String?\n  shippingMethod String?\n  \n  // Address\n  shippingAddress Json\n  \n  // Status\n  status     String   @default(\"PENDING\") // PENDING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, RETURNED\n  \n  // Dates\n  shippedAt   DateTime?\n  deliveredAt DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  invoice Invoice? @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id])\n  items   ShipmentItem[]\n\n  @@map(\"shipments\")\n}\n\nmodel ShipmentItem {\n  id         String  @id @default(cuid())\n  shipmentId String\n  productId  String?\n  variantId  String?\n  \n  // Item details\n  description String?\n  quantity    Int\n  \n  // Partial delivery support\n  delivered   Boolean @default(false)\n  deliveredQuantity Int @default(0)\n\n  // Relations\n  shipment Shipment        @relation(fields: [shipmentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product  Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant  ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"shipment_items\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// VENDORS &amp; SUPPLIERS\n// ============================================================\n\nmodel Vendor {\n  id          String @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  email       String?\n  phone       String?\n  address     Json?\n  \n  // Business info\n  companyName String?\n  taxId       String?\n  \n  // Terms\n  paymentTerms String? // NET_30, NET_15, etc.\n  \n  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  purchaseOrders PurchaseOrder[]\n\n  @@map(\"vendors\")\n}\n\nmodel PurchaseOrder {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  number     String   @unique\n  vendorId   String\n  \n  // Amounts\n  subtotal    Decimal @default(0)\n  taxAmount   Decimal @default(0)\n  totalAmount Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Status\n  status     String   @default(\"DRAFT\") // DRAFT, SENT, APPROVED, RECEIVED, CANCELLED\n  \n  // Dates\n  orderDate    DateTime @default(now())\n  expectedDate DateTime?\n  receivedDate DateTime?\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt\n\n  // Relations\n  vendor Vendor             @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [id])\n  items  PurchaseOrderItem[]\n\n  @@map(\"purchase_orders\")\n}\n\nmodel PurchaseOrderItem {\n  id              String  @id @default(cuid())\n  purchaseOrderId String\n  productId       String?\n  variantId       String?\n  \n  // Custom item\n  customName        String?\n  customDescription String?\n  \n  // Pricing\n  quantity        Decimal\n  unitCost        Decimal\n  lineTotal       Decimal\n  \n  // Receiving\n  receivedQuantity Decimal @default(0)\n  \n  // Order\n  sortOrder Int @default(0)\n\n  // Relations\n  purchaseOrder PurchaseOrder   @relation(fields: [purchaseOrderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product       Product?        @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id])\n  variant       ProductVariant? @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id])\n\n  @@map(\"purchase_order_items\")\n}\n\n// ============================================================\n// INDEXES FOR PERFORMANCE\n// ============================================================\n\n// User indexes\n@@index([User.email])\n@@index([User.username])\n\n// Audit log indexes\n@@index([AuditLog.entityType, AuditLog.entityId])\n@@index([AuditLog.timestamp])\n\n// Product indexes\n@@index([Product.sku])\n@@index([Product.categoryId])\n@@index([ProductVariant.sku])\n\n// Proposal indexes\n@@index([Proposal.number])\n@@index([Proposal.customerId])\n@@index([Proposal.status])\n\n// Invoice indexes\n@@index([Invoice.number])\n@@index([Invoice.customerId])\n@@index([Invoice.status])\n\n// Task indexes\n@@index([Task.assignedToId])\n@@index([Task.projectId])\n@@index([Task.status])\n@@index([Task.dueDate])\n\n// POS indexes\n@@index([PosOrder.orderNumber])\n@@index([PosOrder.orderDate])\n@@index([PosOrder.deviceId])\n\n// Time-based indexes\n@@index([Attendance.date])\n@@index([TimeEntry.startTime])\n@@index([PayrollRecord.payPeriodStart, PayrollRecord.payPeriodEnd])",

}

    "type": 1

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, OnModuleInit, OnModuleDestroy } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';\nimport { ConfigService } from '../config/config.service';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class PrismaService extends PrismaClient implements OnModuleInit, OnModuleDestroy {\n  constructor(private configService: ConfigService) {\n    super({\n      datasources: {\n        db: {\n          url: configService.getDatabaseUrl(),\n        },\n      },\n      log: ['query', 'info', 'warn', 'error'],\n    });\n  }\n\n  async onModuleInit() {\n    await this.$connect();\n  }\n\n  async onModuleDestroy() {\n    await this.$disconnect();\n  }\n\n  // Soft delete helper\n  async softDelete(model: string, id: string) {\n    return this[model].update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: { isActive: false },\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Bulk operations helper\n  async bulkUpsert(model: string, data: any[], uniqueField: string = 'id') {\n    const results = [];\n    for (const item of data) {\n      const result = await this[model].upsert({\n        where: { [uniqueField]: item[uniqueField] },\n        update: item,\n        create: item,\n      });\n      results.push(result);\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // Pagination helper\n  async paginate(model: string, options: {\n    page?: number;\n    limit?: number;\n    where?: any;\n    orderBy?: any;\n    include?: any;\n  }) {\n    const page = options.page || 1;\n    const limit = options.limit || 10;\n    const skip = (page - 1) * limit;\n\n    const [items, total] = await Promise.all([\n      this[model].findMany({\n        skip,\n        take: limit,\n        where: options.where,\n        orderBy: options.orderBy,\n        include: options.include,\n      }),\n      this[model].count({\n        where: options.where,\n      }),\n    ]);\n\n    return {\n      items,\n      total,\n      page,\n      limit,\n      totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),\n      hasNext: page &lt; Math.ceil(total / limit),\n      hasPrev: page &gt; 1,\n    };\n  }\n}",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

{

  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/apps/api/src/app/auth/auth.service.ts)",

  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "import { Injectable, UnauthorizedException } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { JwtService } from '@nestjs/jwt';\nimport { PrismaService } from '../database/prisma.service';\nimport * as bcrypt from 'bcrypt';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class AuthService {\n  constructor(\n    private prisma: PrismaService,\n    private jwtService: JwtService,\n  ) {}\n\n  async validateUser(email: string, password: string) {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { email },\n      include: {\n        roles: {\n          include: {\n            role: true,\n          },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (user &amp;&amp; await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password)) {\n      const { password: _, ...result } = user;\n      return result;\n    }\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  async login(user: any) {\n    const payload = { \n      email: user.email, \n      sub: user.id,\n      roles: user.roles.map(ur =&gt; ur.role.name),\n    };\n\n    const token = this.jwtService.sign(payload);\n\n    // Store session\n    await this.prisma.userSession.create({\n      data: {\n        userId: user.id,\n        token,\n        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), // 24 hours\n      },\n    });\n\n    return {\n      access_token: token,\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        email: user.email,\n        firstName: user.firstName,\n        lastName: user.lastName,\n        roles: user.roles.map(ur =&gt; ur.role.name),\n      },\n    };\n  }\n\n  async register(userData: {\n    email: string;\n    password: string;\n    firstName?: string;\n    lastName?: string;\n  }) {\n    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(userData.password, 10);\n\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.create({\n      data: {\n        ...userData,\n        password: hashedPassword,\n      },\n      include: {\n        roles: {\n          include: {\n            role: true,\n          },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Assign default user role\n    const defaultRole = await this.prisma.role.findFirst({\n      where: { name: 'USER' },\n    });\n\n    if (defaultRole) {\n      await this.prisma.userRole.create({\n        data: {\n          userId: user.id,\n          roleId: defaultRole.id,\n        },\n      });\n    }\n\n    return this.login(user);\n  }\n\n  async logout(token: string) {\n    await this.prisma.userSession.deleteMany({\n      where: { token },\n    });\n  }\n\n  async validateJwt(payload: any) {\n    const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({\n      where: { id: payload.sub },\n      include: {\n        roles: {\n          include: {\n            role: true,\n          },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!user || !user.isActive) {\n      throw new UnauthorizedException();\n    }\n\n    return user;\n  }\n}",

}

{\n    // Initialize offline services\n    OfflineService.initialize();\n    SyncService.initialize();\n  }, []);\n\n  return (\n    &lt;SafeAreaProvider&gt;\n      &lt;NavigationContainer&gt;\n        &lt;Stack.Navigator \n          initialRouteName=\"Login\"\n          screenOptions={{\n            headerStyle: {\n              backgroundColor: '#2563eb',\n            },\n            headerTintColor: '#fff',\n            headerTitleStyle: {\n              fontWeight: 'bold',\n            },\n          }}\n        &gt;\n          &lt;Stack.Screen \n            name=\"Login\" \n            component={LoginScreen}\n            options={{ headerShown: false }}\n          /&gt;\n          &lt;Stack.Screen \n            name=\"Dashboard\" \n            component={DashboardScreen}\n            options={{ title: 'Nucleus Business Suite' }}\n          /&gt;\n          &lt;Stack.Screen \n            name=\"Tasks\" \n            component={TasksScreen}\n            options={{ title: 'Tasks' }}\n          /&gt;\n          &lt;Stack.Screen \n            name=\"Inventory\" \n            component={InventoryScreen}\n            options={{ title: 'Inventory' }}\n          /&gt;\n          &lt;Stack.Screen \n            name=\"POS\" \n            component={POSScreen}\n            options={{ title: 'Point of Sale' }}\n          /&gt;\n        &lt;/Stack.Navigator&gt;\n      &lt;/NavigationContainer&gt;\n      &lt;StatusBar style=\"auto\" /&gt;\n    &lt;/SafeAreaProvider&gt;\n  );\n}",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

api_logs:/app/logs\n      - api_uploads:/app/uploads\n    depends_on:\n      - postgres\n      - redis\n    networks:\n      - nucleus-network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    deploy:\n      replicas: 2\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '0.8'\n      update_config:\n        parallelism: 1\n        delay: 10s\n        order: start-first\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:3001/api/v1/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n\n  # Web Application\n  web:\n    image: nucleus-web:${WEB_VERSION}\n    environment:\n      NODE_ENV: production\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL: https://api.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n      NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL: wss://ws.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n    depends_on:\n      - ```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/ARCHITECTURE.md)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Nucleus-Business-Suite/ARCHITECTURE.md)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# Nucleus Business Suite - Production-Grade TypeScript Full-Stack Boilerplate\n\n## Architecture Summary\n\nNucleus Business Suite is a comprehensive, offline-first business management platform built with TypeScript end-to-end. The architecture follows modern best practices for scalability, maintainability, and offline capabilities, specifically designed for POS mode operation with extensive business features.\n\n### Technology Stack\n\n- **Backend**: NestJS with TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL\n- **Web**: Next.js with shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS\n- **Mobile**: React Native with Expo, SQLite for offline storage\n- **Real-time**: Socket.IO with Redis adapter\n- **Infrastructure**: Docker Compose, Kubernetes-ready\n- **Monorepo**: Nx workspace management\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL (production), SQLite (mobile offline)\n\n### Core Principles\n\n1. **Offline-First**: SQLite local storage with cursor-based synchronization\n2. **Append-Only**: Immutable data patterns, no in-place edits for critical records\n3. **Real-time**: WebSocket-based live updates across all connected devices  \n4. **POS-Ready**: Android tablet optimized with hardware integration points\n5. **Environment-Aware**: Configuration-driven URLs and endpoints from inputs.yml\n6. **Kubernetes-Ready**: Full container orchestration support alongside Docker Compose\n\n## Detailed System Diagram\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\ngraph TB\n    subgraph \"Client Layer\"\n        WEB[Next.js Web App&lt;br/&gt;shadcn/ui + Tailwind]\n        MOBILE[React Native Mobile&lt;br/&gt;Expo + SQLite]\n        POS[POS Tablet&lt;br/&gt;Android + Hardware]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Load Balancer\"\n        LB[Nginx&lt;br/&gt;SSL Termination]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Application Layer\"\n        API[NestJS API Server&lt;br/&gt;Authentication &amp; Business Logic]\n        WS[WebSocket Server&lt;br/&gt;Real-time Updates]\n        SYNC[Sync Service&lt;br/&gt;Offline Synchronization]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Data Layer\"\n        PG[(PostgreSQL&lt;br/&gt;Primary Database)]\n        REDIS[(Redis&lt;br/&gt;Cache &amp; Sessions)]\n        S3[(Object Storage&lt;br/&gt;Files &amp; Media)]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"Infrastructure\"\n        DOCKER[Docker Compose&lt;br/&gt;Development &amp; Staging]\n        K8S[Kubernetes&lt;br/&gt;Production Ready]\n        MONITOR[Observability&lt;br/&gt;Prometheus + Grafana]\n    end\n\n    subgraph \"External Services\"\n        OIDC[Keycloak&lt;br/&gt;Identity Provider]\n        PAYMENT[Payment Gateway&lt;br/&gt;Stripe/PayPal]\n    end\n\n    WEB --&gt; LB\n    MOBILE --&gt; API\n    POS --&gt; API\n    \n    LB --&gt; API\n    LB --&gt; WS\n    \n    API --&gt; PG\n    API --&gt; REDIS\n    API --&gt; S3\n    WS --&gt; REDIS\n    SYNC --&gt; PG\n    \n App\n│       ├── src/\n│       │   ├── screens/           # Mobile screens\n│       │   ├── components/        # Reusable components\n│       │   ├── services/          # Offline sync services\n│       │   └── utils/             # Utilities\n│       ├── App.tsx                # Main app component\n│       ├── app.json               # Expo configuration\n│       └── package.json\n│\n├── libs/                          # Shared libraries\n│   ├── shared/                    # Common utilities\n│   ├── api-interfaces/            # API type definitions\n│   ├── ui-components/             # Shared UI    # Continuous integration\n│       ├── cd-staging.yml         # Staging deployment\n│       └── cd-production.yml      # Production deployment\n│\n└── docs/                          # Documentation\n    ├── api/                       # API documentation\n    ├── deployment/                # Deployment guides\n    └── development/               # Development setup\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Backend Module Map\n\n### Core Modules\n\n1. **AuthModule** - JWT-based authentication with OIDC support\n   - Login/logout, user registration\n   - Role-based access control (RBAC)\n   - Session management\n   - Password reset flows\n\n2. **UsersModule** - User management and profiles\n   - User CRUD operations\n   - Role assignment\n   - Profile management\n   - User preferences\n\n3. **ConfigModule** - Environment-aware configuration\n   - inputs.yml parsing\n   - Environment detection\n   - URL generation from inputs\n   - External service configuration\n\n4. **DatabaseModule** - Prisma ORM integration\n   - Connection management\n   - Migration handling\n   - Query optimization\n   - Connection pooling\n\n### Business Modules\n\n5. **InventoryModule** - Product and inventory management\n   - Product catalog\n   - Stock tracking\n   - Category management\n   - Inventory movements\n   - Low stock alerts\n\n6. **ProposalsModule** - Quotation system with markup pricing\n   - Proposal creation/management\n   - 5-column markup percentage system\n   - Version control and history\n   - Approval workflows\n   - PDF generation\n\n7. **InvoicesModule** - Billing and invoicing\n   - Invoice generation from proposals\n   - Payment tracking\n   - Partial payments\n   - Invoice status management\n   - Tax calculations\n\n8. **ExpensesModule** - Expense tracking and management\n   - Expense categorization\n   - Project-linked expenses\n   - Receipt management\n   - Reporting and analytics\n\n9. **HrModule** - Human Resources management\n   - Employee records\n   - Attendance tracking\n   - Payroll processing\n   - Time and attendance\n   - Performance management\n\n10. **ProjectsModule** - Project management\n    - Project lifecycle management\n    - Team assignments\n    - Budget tracking\n    - Timeline management\n    - Milestone tracking\n\n11. **TasksModule** - Task and ToDo management\n    - Task creation and assignment\n    - Priority levels and status tracking\n    - Project linking (optional)\n    - Recurring tasks\n    - File attachments and comments\n    - Calendar integration\n    - Tagging and categorization\n\n12. **CrmModule** - Customer relationship management\n    - Customer profiles\n    - Contact management\n    - Sales pipeline\n    - Customer history\n    - Communication tracking\n\n### POS-Specific Modules (Active when app_type = POS)\n\n13. **PosModule** - Point of Sale operations\n    - Order processing\n    - Payment handling\n    - Receipt generation\n    - Device management\n    - Shift management\n    - Hardware integration points\n\n14. **DevicesModule** - POS device management\n    - Device registration\n    - Hardware status monitoring\n    - Configuration management\n    - Remote updates\n\n### Technical Modules\n\n15. **SyncModule** - Offline synchronization\n    - Outbox pattern implementation\n    - Cursor-based sync\n    - Conflict resolution\n    - Batch processing\n    - Retry mechanisms\n\n16. **RealtimeModule** - WebSocket real-time updates\n    - Socket.IO integration\n    - Redis adapter for scaling\n    - Event broadcasting\n    - Connection management\n    - Heartbeat monitoring\n\n17. **AuditModule** - Audit logging and compliance\n    - Action logging\n    - Data change tracking\n    - Compliance reporting\n    - Data retention policies\n\n## Offline Sync Endpoints\n\n### Sync Architecture\n\nThe offline synchronization system uses a cursor-based approach with the outbox pattern to ensure data consistency across online and offline operations.\n\n#### Key Endpoints\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nPOST /api/v1/sync/push\n- Accepts batched events from offline devices\n- Validates and processes outbox events\n- Returns confirmation and any conflicts\n\nGET /api/v1/sync/pull/:cursor\n- Returns incremental updates since cursor\n- Supports entity filtering\n- Returns new cursor position\n\nPOST /api/v1/sync/resolve-conflicts\n- Handles conflict resolution\n- Supports last-write-wins and custom strategies\n- Returns resolved state\n\nGET /api/v1/sync/status\n- Returns sync health status\n- Shows pending events count\n- Reports last successful sync\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Sync Event Types\n\n1. **User Events**: &#96;sync.user.created&#96;, &#96;sync.user.updated&#96;\n2. **Product Events**: &#96;sync.product.created&#96;, &#96;sync.product.updated&#96;, &#96;sync.inventory.changed&#96;\n3. **Order Events**: &#96;sync.order.created&#96;, &#96;sync.order.completed&#96;, &#96;sync.payment.processed&#96;\n4. **Task Events**: &#96;sync.task.created&#96;, &#96;sync.task.updated&#96;, &#96;sync.task.completed&#96;\n\n#### Conflict Resolution Strategies\n\n- **Server Wins**: Server data takes precedence (default for critical data)\n- **Client Wins**: Client data takes precedence (for user preferences)\n- **Merge**: Intelligent merging based on field-level timestamps\n- **Manual**: Queue for human resolution\n\n## Real-time Event Contracts\n\n### WebSocket Events\n\nThe system uses Socket.IO for real-time bidirectional communication with Redis clustering support.\n\n#### Connection Events\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Client → Server\ninterface ClientEvents {\n  'auth': (token: string) =&gt; void;\n  'join-room': (room: string) =&gt; void;\n  'leave-room': (room: string) =&gt; void;\n  'ping': () =&gt; void;\n}\n\n// Server → Client  \ninterface ServerEvents {\n  'authenticated': (user: User) =&gt; void;\n  'joined-room': (room: string) =&gt; void;\n  'error': (error: ErrorMessage) =&gt; void;\n  'pong': () =&gt; void;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Business Events\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\ninterface BusinessEvents {\n  // Inventory updates\n  'inventory:stock-low': (product: Product) =&gt; void;\n  'inventory:updated': (movement: InventoryMovement) =&gt; void;\n  \n  // Order events\n  'order:created': (order: Order) =&gt; void;\n  'order:updated': (order: Order) =&gt; void;\n  'order:completed': (order: Order) =&gt; void;\n  \n  // Task events  \n  'task:assigned': (task: Task, assignee: User) =&gt; void;\n  'task:completed': (task: Task) =&gt; void;\n  'task:due-soon': (task: Task) =&gt; void;\n  \n  // System events\n  'system:maintenance': (message: string) =&gt; void;\n  'system:sync-complete': () =&gt; void;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Room Structure\n\n- &#96;user:${userId}&#96; - Personal notifications\n- &#96;pos:${deviceId}&#96; - POS device updates  \n- &#96;project:${projectId}&#96; - Project team updates\n- &#96;admin&#96; - Administrative broadcasts\n\n## Database Schema &amp; Migration Outline\n\n### Core Entity Relationships\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nerDiagram\n    User ||--o{ UserRole : has\n    Role ||--o{ UserRole : assigned\n    User ||--o{ Task : \"assigned to\"\n    User ||--o{ Task : creates\n    User ||--o{ ProjectMember : \"member of\"\n    \n    Customer ||--o{ Proposal : places\n    Customer ||--o{ Invoice : receives\n    Customer ||--o{ PosOrder : orders\n    \n    Proposal ||--o{ ProposalItem : contains\n    Proposal ||--o{ Invoice : \"converts to\"\n    \n    Product ||--o{ ProposalItem : \"appears in\"\n    Product ||--o{ InvoiceItem : \"appears in\"\n    Product ||--o{ PosOrderItem : \"sold as\"\n    \n    Project ||--o{ Task : contains\n    Project ||--o{ ProjectMember : \"has members\"\n    Project ||--o{ Expense : \"tracks costs\"\n    \n    Task ||--o{ TaskComment : \"has comments\"\n    Task ||--o{ TaskAttachment : \"has files\"\n    Task ||--o{ TimeEntry : \"tracks time\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Key Tables &amp; Indexes\n\n#### Performance-Critical Indexes\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\n-- User lookup optimization\nCREATE INDEX users_email_idx ON users(email);\nCREATE INDEX users_active_idx ON users(is_active) WHERE is_active = true;\n\n-- Product search optimization  \nCREATE INDEX products_sku_idx ON products(sku);\nCREATE INDEX products_name_search_idx ON products USING gin(to_tsvector('english', name));\nCREATE INDEX products_category_active_idx ON products(category_id, is_active);\n\n-- Order processing optimization\nCREATE INDEX orders_date_idx ON pos_orders(order_date DESC);\nCREATE INDEX orders_device_date_idx ON pos_orders(device_id, order_date DESC);\nCREATE INDEX orders_status_idx ON pos_orders(status) WHERE status != 'COMPLETED';\n\n-- Task management optimization\nCREATE INDEX tasks_assignee_status_idx ON tasks(assigned_to_id, status);\nCREATE INDEX tasks_due_date_idx ON tasks(due_date) WHERE due_date IS NOT NULL;\nCREATE INDEX tasks_project_status_idx ON tasks(project_id, status);\n\n-- Audit and sync optimization\nCREATE INDEX audit_logs_timestamp_idx ON audit_logs(timestamp DESC);\nCREATE INDEX outbox_events_processed_idx ON outbox_events(processed, created_at);\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Migration Strategy\n\n1. **Schema Versioning**: Use Prisma migrations with descriptive names\n2. **Backwards Compatibility**: Maintain API compatibility during schema changes  \n3. **Zero-Downtime**: Use blue-green deployments for major migrations\n4. **Data Integrity**: Foreign key constraints with appropriate cascade rules\n5. **Performance**: Add indexes before they're needed based on query patterns\n\n## Docker Compose Configurations\n\n### Development Environment (&#96;dev.docker-compose.yml&#96;)\n- **Services**: postgres, redis, minio, api, web, websocket\n- **Features**: Hot reload, development secrets, port exposure\n- **Data**: Volumes for persistent data during development\n- **Networking**: Bridge network for service communication\n\n### Staging Environment (&#96;staging.docker-compose.yml&#96;)  \n- **Services**: postgres, redis, api, web, websocket, nginx\n- **Features**: SSL termination, health checks, restart policies\n- **Configuration**: Environment-based configuration\n- **Monitoring**: Basic logging and health endpoints\n\n### Production Environment (&#96;prod.docker-compose.yml&#96;)\n- **Services**: Full stack with monitoring (prometheus, grafana)\n- **Features**: Resource limits, multiple replicas, load balancing\n- **Security**: Secret management, SSL certificates  \n- **Observability**: Metrics collection, log aggregation\n- **Scaling**: Horizontal scaling support for stateless services\n\n### Environment Configuration\n\nEach environment respects the &#96;data_services.mode&#96; from inputs.yml:\n\n- **Local Mode**: Docker Compose manages postgres, redis, and object storage\n- **External Mode**: Applications connect to managed services (RDS, ElastiCache, S3)\n\n## Kubernetes Readiness\n\n### Deployment Architecture\n\nThe Kubernetes manifests provide production-grade orchestration with:\n\n#### Application Deployments\n- **API Deployment**: 3 replicas with rolling updates\n- **Web Deployment**: 3 replicas with efficient resource utilization  \n- **WebSocket Deployment**: 2 replicas with sticky sessions\n- **Resource Management**: CPU/memory requests and limits\n\n#### Service Configuration\n- **ClusterIP Services**: Internal service discovery\n- **LoadBalancer**: External traffic distribution\n- **Ingress Controller**: Domain-based routing with SSL\n\n#### Infrastructure\n- **ConfigMaps**: Environment configuration management\n- **Secrets**: Secure credential storage\n- **PersistentVolumes**: Stateful data storage\n- **NetworkPolicies**: Secure inter-service communication\n\n#### Scaling &amp; Reliability\n- **HorizontalPodAutoscaler**: Automatic scaling based on metrics\n- **PodDisruptionBudgets**: Maintain availability during updates\n- **Health Checks**: Liveness and readiness probes\n- **Rolling Updates**: Zero-downtime deployments\n\n### Environment Mapping\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\n# Production\n- Host: erp.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- API: api.powerbyteitsolutions.com  \n- WebSocket: ws.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\n# Staging\n- Host: staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- API: api-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- WebSocket: ws-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## CI/CD Pipeline Outline\n\n### GitHub Actions Workflows\n\n#### Continuous Integration (&#96;.github/workflows/ci.yml&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nname: Continuous Integration\non: [push, pull_request]\n\njobs:\n  test:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    services:\n      postgres:\n        image: postgres:15\n        env:\n          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres\n        options: &gt;-\n          --health-cmd pg_isready\n          --health-interval 10s\n          --health-timeout 5s\n          --health-retries 5\n          \n  steps:\n    - name: Checkout\n    - name: Setup Node.js\n    - name: Install dependencies\n    - name: Lint code\n    - name: Run tests\n    - name: Build applications\n    - name: Security scan\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Staging Deployment (&#96;.github/workflows/cd-staging.yml&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml  \nname: Deploy to Staging\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [develop]\n\njobs:\n  deploy:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    steps:\n      - name: Build and push Docker images\n      - name: Deploy to staging environment  \n      - name: Run smoke tests\n      - name: Update deployment status\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Production Deployment (&#96;.github/workflows/cd-production.yml&#96;)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nname: Deploy to Production  \non:\n  push:\n    tags: ['v*']\n\njobs:\n  deploy:\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    environment: production\n    steps:\n      - name: Security approval gate\n      - name: Build production images\n      - name: Deploy with blue-green strategy\n      - name: Run comprehensive tests\n      - name: Switch traffic to new version\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Deployment Strategies\n\n1. **Development**: Direct deployment from feature branches\n2. **Staging**: Automatic deployment from develop branch\n3. **Production**: Tag-based deployment with manual approval gates\n4. **Rollback**: Automated rollback on health check failures\n\n## Security &amp; Observability Baseline\n\n### Security Measures\n\n#### Authentication &amp; Authorization\n- **OIDC Integration**: Keycloak for enterprise identity management\n- **JWT Tokens**: Secure, stateless authentication\n- **RBAC**: Fine-grained role-based access control\n- **Session Management**: Secure session handling with Redis\n\n#### Data Protection  \n- **Encryption at Rest**: Database and file storage encryption\n- **Encryption in Transit**: TLS 1.3 for all communications\n- **Secret Management**: Kubernetes secrets and environment variables\n- **Input Validation**: Comprehensive request validation and sanitization\n\n#### Security Headers\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Security middleware configuration\napp.use(helmet({\n  contentSecurityPolicy: {\n    directives: {\n      defaultSrc: [\"'self'\"],\n      scriptSrc: [\"'self'\", \"'unsafe-inline'\"],\n      styleSrc: [\"'self'\", \"'unsafe-inline'\"],\n      imgSrc: [\"'self'\", \"data:\", \"https:\"],\n    },\n  },\n  hsts: {\n    maxAge: 31536000,\n    includeSubDomains: true,\n    preload: true,\n  },\n}));\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Rate Limiting\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// API rate limiting\n@Throttle(100, 60) // 100 requests per minute\nexport class ApiController {\n  // Protected endpoints\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Observability Stack\n\n#### Metrics Collection (Prometheus)\n- **Application Metrics**: Request rate, response time, error rate\n- **Business Metrics**: Orders per minute, inventory changes, user activity\n- **Infrastructure Metrics**: CPU, memory, disk usage\n- **Custom Metrics**: POS transaction volume, sync success rate\n\n#### Logging (Structured JSON)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Structured logging example\nlogger.info('User authentication', {\n  userId: user.id,\n  email: user.email,\n  source: 'web',\n  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n  correlationId: request.correlationId,\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n#### Distributed Tracing (OpenTelemetry)\n- **Request Tracing**: End-to-end request flow\n- **Database Queries**: Query performance monitoring  \n- **External Service Calls**: Third-party API monitoring\n- **Error Tracking**: Detailed error context and stack traces\n\n#### Dashboard &amp; Alerting (Grafana)\n- **System Health Dashboard**: Overview of all services\n- **Business Metrics Dashboard**: KPIs and business insights\n- **Alerting Rules**: Automated alerts for critical issues\n- **SLA Monitoring**: Service level agreement tracking\n\n### Monitoring Endpoints\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\n// Health check endpoints\nGET /api/v1/health        // Basic service health\nGET /api/v1/health/ready  // Readiness probe\nGET /api/v1/health/live   // Liveness probe  \nGET /api/v1/metrics       // Prometheus metrics\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Security Scanning\n\n1. **Dependency Scanning**: Automated vulnerability detection\n2. **Code Quality**: SonarQube integration\n3. **Container Scanning**: Docker image security analysis\n4. **Penetration Testing**: Regular security assessments\n\n---\n\n## Environment URLs (From inputs.yml)\n\nAll environment URLs are derived from the immutable inputs.yml configuration:\n\n### Development\n- **Web**: http://localhost:3000\n- **API**: http://localhost:3001  \n- **WebSocket**: ws://localhost:3002\n\n### Staging\n- **Web**: https://staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- **API**: https://api-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- **WebSocket**: wss://ws-staging.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\n### Production  \n- **Web**: https://erp.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- **API**: https://api.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n- **WebSocket**: wss://ws.powerbyteitsolutions.com\n\nThis architecture provides a solid foundation for a scalable, maintainable, and feature-rich business management platform that can operate efficiently both online and offline, with particular strength in POS environments.",

**Devcontainer config**
```json
{
  "name": "Nucleus Business Suite DevContainer",
  "dockerComposeFile": [
    "../docker/dev.docker-compose.yml"
  ],
  "service": "api",
  "runServices": [
    "postgres",
    "redis",
    "minio",
    "api",
    "web",
    "websocket"
  ],
  "workspaceFolder": "/workspaces/nucleus-business-suite",
  "workspaceMount": "source=${localWorkspaceFolder},target=/workspaces/nucleus-business-suite,type=bind",
  "shutdownAction": "stopCompose",
  "postCreateCommand": "npm install",
  "forwardPorts": [3000, 3001, 3002, 5432, 6379, 9000, 9001],
  "customizations": {
    "vscode": {
      "extensions": [
        "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
        "dbaeumer.vscode-eslint",
        "Prisma.prisma",
        "ms-azuretools.vscode-docker",
        "ms-vscode.vscode-typescript-next",
        "bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

**README snippet**
Updated section in `README.md`:
```
## VS Code Devcontainer Setup

Develop inside the existing Docker Compose stack via VS Code Dev Containers.

1) Prerequisites
- Docker with Docker Compose
- VS Code + Dev Containers extension (`ms-vscode-remote.remote-containers`)

2) Open in the container
- In VS Code: Ctrl+Shift+P → Dev Containers: Reopen in Container
- Uses docker/dev.docker-compose.yml (service: api) and starts supporting services (postgres, redis, minio, web, websocket).

3) Workspace and ports
- Workspace path in container: /workspaces/nucleus-business-suite
- Forwarded: 3000 (web), 3001 (api), 3002 (ws), 5432 (postgres), 6379 (redis), 9000/9001 (minio)

4) Common commands (run inside the devcontainer)
npm install
npm run lint
npm run test
npm run dev
```

You can now reopen the project in VS Code using “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container” and run install/lint/test/dev commands inside the container.
